tasks.title: WhatsApp MCP — 2-way reliable messaging
tasks.notes: PAUSED 2026-05-05 by Inon. All WhatsApp software stopped: bridge killed, watchdog scheduled task deleted, no auto-start. Current Go bridge is fundamentally fragile (port conflicts, SQLite stuck transactions, manual restarts required). Open questions when resuming: (1) How does Inon send messages TO Andy? (2) Windows Service for auto-restart; (3) 2-way comms needs a dedicated number — Green API recommended; (4) Remote control / dispatch trigger from WhatsApp. Resume when Inon is ready — recommend Green API (commercial REST, no local bridge, true 2-way) as the clean solution.
